item.title: Revolution Medicines / daraxonrasib
item.description:
• Summary: Revolution Medicines is advancing daraxonrasib in clinical trials, with data highlighting its efficacy as a KRAS G12C inhibitor in treating cancers such as non-small cell lung cancer.
  • MoAs: Daraxonrasib is a KRAS G12C inhibitor that covalently binds to the mutated KRAS protein to block oncogenic signaling pathways.
  • Sources: STAT News
